experiments.name: haac-homepage-pod-delete
experiments.description: Delete the Homepage pod in the management namespace to verify the operator dashboard recovers cleanly through the gateway.

experiments.name: haac-ntfy-pod-delete
experiments.description: Delete the Ntfy pod in the management namespace to validate notification-path recovery without touching the control plane.

experiments.name: haac-headlamp-pod-delete
experiments.description: Delete the Headlamp pod in the management namespace to verify the cluster dashboard and OIDC front door recover cleanly.

experiments.name: haac-radarr-pod-delete
experiments.description: Delete the Radarr pod in the media namespace to validate media-helper recovery on persistent storage with low blast radius.

experiments.name: haac-prowlarr-pod-delete
experiments.description: Delete the Prowlarr pod in the media namespace to validate indexer-path recovery before downstream media requests fan out.
